title: 4 Pcs Light Up Yo Yo Balls, Flashing Responsive Yoyo Toys for Kids, Colorful LED Light Up Yoyo, Perfect for Beginners, Party Favors, and Fun Trick Play for Kids
features: Fun and Educational for Kids: This yoyo kids toy helps improve hand-eye coordination and motor skills while providing endless entertainment. The light up yoyo promotes focus and dexterity as kids master tricks and improve their skills.

Safe and Lightweight Plastic Construction: The yoyo ball is made from high-quality plastic, free of toxic chemicals and unpleasant odors. Its lightweight design makes it easy for kids to play with, ensuring hours of fun without feeling heavy or uncomfortable.

Perfect Size for One-Handed Play: With a size of 6x4 cm, the yoyo is designed to fit comfortably in the hand, making it easy to control and ideal for single-handed tricks. It's perfect for both beginners and more experienced players.

Easy and Exciting Gameplay: To use the yoyo ball, simply hold the string in your hand, throw the yoyo vertically, and let the string pull it back up. With a simple, fun motion, kids can enjoy endless hours of play with this responsive yoyo.

description: Product description Bring the fun and excitement of tricks and games to life with this yoyo set, designed for both beginners and experienced players. This yoyo ball is perfect for yoyo kids looking to improve their skills and coordination. Made from durable, lightweight plastic, it’s easy to handle and safe for children, with no toxic chemicals or unpleasant odors. Featuring a light up yoyo design, this set includes 4 vibrant, colorful yoyos that light up as they spin, making them perfect for nighttime play. Whether you’re practicing tricks or just having fun, the bright LED lights add a whole new level of excitement to your playtime. The compact size makes it comfortable for one-handed play, and it’s ideal for kids looking to develop their hand-eye coordination and motor skills. This yoyo set also makes a fantastic gift for kids, offering a fun and challenging activity that will keep them entertained for hours. Whether at a party, during outdoor play, or in the evening with the lights shining brightly, this yoyo ball is sure to provide endless fun and a sense of accomplishment as they master new tricks.
